author: srimanob
body:
#### PR description:
Currently, Phase-2 prodlike workflow uses DIGI:pdigi_valid instead of DIGI. This PR is to fix that.

#### PR validation:
Get proper cmsDriver(s) when use
`runTheMatrix.py --what upgrade -l 23234.0,23234.21,23434.21,23434.9921 --dryRun`

#### if this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR:
Not a backport, and no need for backport
title: Fix prodlike workflow to use DIGI instead of DIGI:pdigi_valid
